_comment: OS 5.5+ variant: launches MLUAR through the Cesium shell app, since the
OS itself refuses to run assembly programs. Assumes Cesium is APPS item
4 and MLUAR is the 10th entry in its file list - adjust the key|down
count and the app slot for your ROM's contents.
Flow: picker lists SMOKE (the transferred bytecode appvar), enter runs
it, the hash checks the printed output, then exit via pause + clear.
Run tools/get_clibs.py once to fetch test/clibs (LibLoad + graphx).

1.description: Home screen after the SMOKE appvar ran
